protocol_definition.name: Voting
protocol_definition.message_flow: Agents answer independently, then cast private ballots; plurality selects the output.
protocol_definition.visibility: Answers are private before voting; voters see all anonymized proposals during voting.
protocol_definition.termination: Stop after ballot aggregation; deterministic lowest-index tie break.

However, **Proposal 1** was the first to initiate relevant searches and at least attempted to cover all four required products (Otter.ai, Fireflies.ai, Zoom AI Companion, Google Workspace Gemini). The others largely repeated similar searches without advancing toward the final output.

Given that none fully satisfied the task, I must vote for the one that made the most progress toward the required structure.
